title: West Africa Independence
description: Quiz on national liberation movements in British, French, and Portuguese West Africa.

questions.question: Which was the first British colony in sub-Saharan Africa to gain independence?
In what year did the Gold Coast become independent and adopt the name Ghana?
What political party did Kwame Nkrumah found after leaving the UGCC?
Which French colony in West Africa voted NO to Charles de Gaulle's 1958 referendum?
When was the independent Republic of Guinea proclaimed?
The National Council of Nigeria and Cameroon (NCNC) was primarily based in which region?
In what year did Nigeria become independent?
Why did Portuguese African colonies gain independence later than British and French colonies?
options: Portugal considered them overseas provinces and refused decolonisation
questions.correctAnswer: Portugal considered them overseas provinces and refused decolonisation

questions.question: In which year did Guinea-Bissau achieve independence?
Which of these pairs of countries achieved independence in 1960?
